<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the green shapes
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try clicking the left green shape (node 10)
# Boundary: [[19, 37], [19, 41], [23, 41], [23, 37]]
# Center roughly at [21, 39]
print("\nClick left green shape (node 10) at [21, 39]")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 21, 'col': 39}])
print(f"Result: score={last_action_result.get('score')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check changes
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    changes = []
    for n in after_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('N', 'Y', 'c', 'g', 'G') and n['pixels'] < 50:
            print(f"  {n['color']} node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
